title: ulmus campestris minor
intro: Ulmus campestris minor, also known as the field elm or dwarf elm, is a small to medium-sized deciduous tree or shrub belonging to the elm family (Ulmaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Ulmus campestris minor include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Ulmus campestris minor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
